title: Review: Android foreground service + relay keep-alive
notes: Confidence: 85% chance of no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) did not run the Android build or test the foreground service against a real device — Android behavior on Doze/battery-optimization edge cases can only be verified empirically; (2) did not audit the full jmap.rs space_set function beyond the extracted function and space_join fix — there may be other patch paths or creation paths with missing role validation. Would raise confidence if: integration test for BackgroundService/NieForegroundService on API 33 and 34 devices, and full jmap.rs space_set coverage for the creation-time member insertion path.
